# Copilot Instructions

This repository is dedicated to KCNA study content.

- Keep changes focused on study notes, checklist updates, and resource links.
- Verify technical content against up-to-date official sources first (Linux Foundation KCNA, CNCF, and Kubernetes documentation).
- If a statement cannot be confirmed from official documentation, mark it as a note/question instead of a fact.
- Use third-party sources only as complementary material after official references are checked.
- Use concise Markdown with clear headings and bullet points.
- Preserve the existing topic structure under `topics/`.
- Keep each topic `notes.md` structured with clear sections such as:
  - Core concepts and definitions
  - Key commands/examples
  - Exam-focused reminders
  - Links to official references
- Keep `resources.md` focused on durable, high-value links and prefer official pages over blog posts.
